[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 2/14 (Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Commissions will be doubled.
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 2/14 (Mon) 19:00 – 2/21 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
